top.name: Disintegrate
top.rules_text: Spend 3 charge. Deal 14 damage. If this is lethal, exile the target (it cannot be resurrected).

bottom.name: Arcane Nexus
bottom.rules_text: Create a Nexus on a tile (10 HP). While it exists, gain 1 charge at the start of each turn and your spells within 2 of it cost 1 less.

upgrades.description: Disintegrate hits harder. Nexus is sturdier.

changes.value: Spend 3 charge. Deal 18 damage. If lethal, exile the target.
Create a Nexus on a tile (14 HP). Gain 1 charge each turn; spells within 2 of it cost 1 less.
Spend 2 charge. Deal 18 damage. If lethal, exile the target.

upgrades.description: Ley Nexus: banks 2 charge per turn.

changes.value: Create a Nexus (14 HP). Gain 2 charge each turn; spells within 2 of it cost 1 less.

upgrades.description: Annihilate: refund the charge if the target is destroyed.

changes.value: Spend 2 charge. Deal 18 damage. If lethal, exile the target and refund the charge.

upgrades.description: Grand Nexus: discount widens to 2 mana within range 3.

changes.value: Create a Nexus (14 HP). Gain 2 charge each turn; spells within 3 cost 2 less.

upgrades.description: Unmake: obliterates the target and everything adjacent.

changes.value: Spend 2 charge. Deal 22 damage; exile on lethal and refund charge. Deal 10 to adjacent enemies.

upgrades.description: The Great Nexus: a fortified engine that also damages nearby enemies.

changes.value: Create a Nexus (20 HP). Gain 2 charge/turn; spells within 3 cost 2 less; enemies within 3 take 3/turn.
